name: Warbird Pro V9
default_study_name: Warbird Pro V9 5m Main Indicator Optimization
notes: Canonical main chart indicator named Warbird Pro V9. Fib anchor ownership and ladder math are protected. Databento may supply ES/MES training data but is not the Pine indicator source.

name: Warbird Pro V9 Exit Modeling
default_study_name: Warbird Pro V9 ES MES ATR Risk Exit Modeling
notes: Separate V9 Optuna lane for manifest-backed ES/MES training rows from TradingView exports or Databento market data. NQ/MNQ rows are ignored. Negative fib extension stops are not candidates; -.236 may be retained only as context/export feature. The profile models ATR/risk exits and does not edit Pine until promotion approval.

name: Warbird Nexus Machine Learning RSI
default_study_name: Warbird Nexus ML Fast 5m Signal Quality 2026-04-27 ACTIVE
notes: Nexus footprint lane. Optimizes Nexus indicator settings only from manifest-backed TradingView/Pine request.footprint() snapshots containing nexus_fp_available, nexus_fp_bar_delta, and nexus_fp_total_volume. CSV exports, local OHLCV parquet, and synthetic body/wick delta are invalid for this lane.
